curation_notes: The patch (PR #690) replaces the satori/go.uuid dependency with google/uuid across 4 non-test source files (canal/sync.go, mysql/mysql_gtid.go, replication/binlogsyncer.go, replication/event.go). The only UUID generation call is uuid.NewV1() in replication/binlogsyncer.go registerSlave(); the other files only parse, compare, or serialize UUIDs and are not vulnerable. Noisy because 4 non-test source files were modified. Pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (CWE-338) confirmed — the vulnerability is use of math/rand instead of crypto/rand for UUID generation in the satori/go.uuid dependency.
